assertions.assertion: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertions.evidence: Lines 1-4 contain --- delimited YAML frontmatter with name: pandas-data-cleaning and description: 'Clean, normalize, and transform tabular data using pandas...'

assertions.assertion: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning data cleaning or pandas
assertions.evidence: Description contains 'Use when cleaning data, wrangling DataFrames, handling NaN values, deduplicating rows, normalizing column names, converting column types, reading messy CSVs, or preparing data for analysis. Also use when the user mentions pandas, data cleaning, data wrangling, or data preprocessing.'

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body covers handling missing values with code examples
assertions.evidence: Section '### 3. Handle missing values' (lines 86-115) includes a strategy table by data type and code examples using fillna(median), fillna(0), fillna('unknown'), dropna(subset=...), and sentinel value replacement

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body covers deduplication with code examples
assertions.evidence: Section '### 5. Deduplicate' (lines 148-171) covers exact duplicates (drop_duplicates()), business key duplicates (subset=['email'], keep='last'), and near-duplicates with normalization, all with code examples

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body covers column name normalization or type conversion
assertions.evidence: Section '### 2. Normalize column names' (lines 63-83) shows snake_case normalization with code. Section '### 4. Convert types' (lines 117-144) covers pd.to_numeric, pd.to_datetime, categorical, boolean mapping, and nullable Int64 with code examples

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body uses progressive disclosure by referencing separate files for detailed patterns
assertions.evidence: While separate files exist (references/pandas-patterns.md, scripts/inspect-csv.ts, scripts/validate-cleaned.ts, assets/cleaning-template.py), the SKILL.md body never references or links to any of them. No progressive disclosure pattern is used — all content is inline in the SKILL.md

assertions.assertion: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertions.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3) covering sales data CSV cleaning, user data CSV cleaning, and IoT sensor Parquet cleaning, each with 8 assertions

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertions.evidence: Section '## Common mistakes' (lines 273-284) contains a table with 8 mistakes and fixes covering blanket fillna, errors='ignore', dedup without subset, sentinel values, type conversion order, inplace=True, missing row count logging, and CSV vs Parquet

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body contains a workflow or ordered checklist for the cleaning pipeline
assertions.evidence: Section '## Workflow' (lines 37-189) provides a numbered 6-step pipeline: 1. Load and inspect, 2. Normalize column names, 3. Handle missing values, 4. Convert types, 5. Deduplicate, 6. Validate and export. Additionally, '## Checklist' (lines 195-205) provides a 9-item checkbox checklist
